ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2026 Continued To Jul-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The case is set for a case management conference on August 12, 2026, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
